channel.title: Monthly on Git Trending Rank
channel.description: Recent content in Monthly on Git Trending Rank

item.title: GitHub 趋势 2026年5月
item.description:
mattpocock / skills

Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

🔠 Shell ⭐ 104928 🔱 9285
⭐ 85843 stars this month

colbymchenry / codegraph

Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 24553 🔱 1352
⭐ 20676 stars this month

anthropics / financial-services

🔠 Python ⭐ 27503 🔱 3857
⭐ 19626 stars this month

CloakHQ / CloakBrowser

Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

🔠 Python ⭐ 20863 🔱 1649
⭐ 18723 stars this month

#1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

⭐ 15283 stars this month

Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

⭐ 16935 stars this month

⭐ 26930 stars this month

🔠 ⭐ 154382 🔱 15814
⭐ 69590 stars this month

⭐ 13052 stars this month

🔠 Python ⭐ 11621 🔱 1107
⭐ 10414 stars this month

decolua / 9router

Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

🔠 JavaScript ⭐ 14190 🔱 2124
⭐ 11024 stars this month

Lum1104 / Understand-Anything

Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 30231 🔱 2515
⭐ 16304 stars this month

Alishahryar1 / free-claude-code

🔠 Python ⭐ 29548 🔱 4438
⭐ 22082 stars this month

ruvnet / ruflo

🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 54977 🔱 6251
⭐ 22025 stars this month

item.title: GitHub 趋势 2026年3月
item.description:
msitarzewski / agency-agents

A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

🔠 Shell ⭐ 67403 🔱 10184
⭐ 65608 stars this month

666ghj / MiroFish

A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

🔠 Python ⭐ 46970 🔱 6698
⭐ 41979 stars this month

NousResearch / hermes-agent

The agent that grows with you

🔠 Python ⭐ 20216 🔱 2452
⭐ 17048 stars this month

bytedance / deer-flow

An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

🔠 Python ⭐ 55196 🔱 6680
⭐ 32530 stars this month

shareAI-lab / learn-claude-code

Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 45053 🔱 6925
⭐ 24982 stars this month

shanraisshan / claude-code-best-practice

practice made claude perfect

🔠 HTML ⭐ 28433 🔱 2380
⭐ 19913 stars this month

affaan-m / everything-claude-code

The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

🔠 JavaScript ⭐ 126287 🔱 17129
⭐ 65098 stars this month

lightpanda-io / browser

Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

🔠 Zig ⭐ 26317 🔱 1065
⭐ 14197 stars this month

mvanhorn / last30days-skill

AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

🔠 Python ⭐ 16870 🔱 1344
⭐ 13120 stars this month

alirezarezvani / claude-skills

220+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.

🔠 Python ⭐ 8383 🔱 1000
⭐ 6125 stars this month

volcengine / OpenViking

OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

🔠 Python ⭐ 20263 🔱 1409
⭐ 15988 stars this month

moeru-ai / airi

💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 36736 🔱 3633
⭐ 18952 stars this month

obra / superpowers

An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

🔠 Shell ⭐ 128005 🔱 10461
⭐ 61346 stars this month

langchain-ai / open-swe

An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent

🔠 Python ⭐ 8920 🔱 1028
⭐ 3633 stars this month

jarrodwatts / claude-hud

A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

🔠 JavaScript ⭐ 15734 🔱 656
⭐ 11515 stars this month

TauricResearch / TradingAgents

TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

🔠 Python ⭐ 45144 🔱 8158
⭐ 13731 stars this month

ruvnet / RuView

π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

🔠 Rust ⭐ 44941 🔱 6026
⭐ 37136 stars this month

promptfoo / promptfoo

Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

🔠 TypeScript ⭐ 18929 🔱 1623
⭐ 8147 stars this month

🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, MCP, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference

sansan0 / TrendRadar
